item.title: Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈 🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐 🐈 Robert Downey Jr. maintains…
item.author: eugeniat2.bsky.social (@eugeniat2.bsky.social)
item.description:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary
item.content:encoded:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary

item.title: Th Honda Prologue will no longer be sold in the U.S., joinin…

item.description: Th Honda Prologue will no longer be sold in the U.S., joining a growing list of EV models to exit the market this year.

item.title: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain li…
item.author: Sort of Damocles (@sortofdamocles.bsky.social)
item.description: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain link fence, scaffolding, a stripey curtain-tarp, and two or three National Guard soldiers protecting it.

item.title: フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート
item.content:encoded:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート

item.content:encoded: 夢幻ノヨウナ幸福 [喫茶綴]

item.title: Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights u…
item.author: [giver of problems: pro max✨] (@jforjae.bsky.social)
item.description:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.
item.content:encoded:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.

item.title: Rocky is on a little weekend break at the beach with his new…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
Rocky is on a little weekend break at the beach with his new family.

Look at his little digging at the end.

Apparently he is using his older brother Coconut to help get around by following him ❤️
item.content:encoded:
Rocky is on a little weekend break at the beach with his new family.

item.title: Video: WSJ’s David Uberti explains how the Strategic Petrole…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Video: WSJ’s David Uberti explains how the Strategic Petroleum Reserve works to help blunt the impact of oil shocks such as the Iran War. www.wsj.com/business/ene...
item.content:encoded: Video: WSJ’s David Uberti explains how the Strategic Petroleum Reserve works to help blunt the impact of oil shocks such as the Iran War. www.wsj.com/business/ene...

item.title: 居酒屋の連勤で腕がずっと重いです(*^^*) 給料日なのに残高が18万にも届かなくてシフト表とにらめっこしてました 正直…
item.author: S (@saaasaaaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
居酒屋の連勤で腕がずっと重いです(*^^*)
給料日なのに残高が18万にも届かなくてシフト表とにらめっこしてました
正直メンエスは怖いイメージしかなかったんですが
無理な出勤せず先月より手取りしっかり増えました(((o(*ﾟ▽ﾟ*)o)))❣️
同じように夜悩んでる人今の生活あと何年続けられそうですか(*^^*)❤︎
item.content:encoded:
居酒屋の連勤で腕がずっと重いです(*^^*)
給料日なのに残高が18万にも届かなくてシフト表とにらめっこしてました
正直メンエスは怖いイメージしかなかったんですが
無理な出勤せず先月より手取りしっかり増えました(((o(*ﾟ▽ﾟ*)o)))❣️
同じように夜悩んでる人今の生活あと何年続けられそうですか(*^^*)❤︎

item.title: おはようございます 昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな…
item.author: りょんぱぱ (@bunpepapa.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰

item.title: Watch Duty, an app known for tracking California wildfires, …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Watch Duty, an app known for tracking California wildfires, is moving beyond that mission. Millions of people are turning to it for help and the mapping and forecasting provided by the app are quickly becoming indispensable for emergency authorities.
item.content:encoded: Watch Duty, an app known for tracking California wildfires, is moving beyond that mission. Millions of people are turning to it for help and the mapping and forecasting provided by the app are quickly becoming indispensable for emergency authorities.

item.title: おはようございます。本日は、曇り。 一日中湿度が高いようです🥲 お天気も不安定みたいですね。 念のため雨具の用意してお…
item.author: しろまむ (@shiromamu.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会

item.title: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guita…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guitar sound that defined Southern rock, and recorded an album that disappeared for 57 years. This is the story of The 2nd Coming.
item.content:encoded: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guitar sound that defined Southern rock, and recorded an album that disappeared for 57 years. This is the story of The 2nd Coming.

item.title: Fussballerisch gesehen sollte Spanien Weltmeister werden. Po…
item.author: Quer-Querdenker🏳️‍🌈 - jedes Quer braucht ein Quer in Politik+Alltag (@quer-querdenker.bsky.social)
item.description: Fussballerisch gesehen sollte Spanien Weltmeister werden. Politisch gesehen sowieso !
item.content:encoded: Fussballerisch gesehen sollte Spanien Weltmeister werden. Politisch gesehen sowieso !

item.title: THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend hi…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵
item.content:encoded:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵

item.title: Naja Spahn tritt nicht mit einer Entschuldigung und wegen Ei…
item.author: ᵀᴼᴿᵀᵁᴿᴱ ᴰᴬᴺᶜᴱ (@sagebock.eurosky.social)
item.description: Naja Spahn tritt nicht mit einer Entschuldigung und wegen Einsicht zurück, sondern wegen des Spagats zwischen Familie und Beruf.
item.content:encoded: Naja Spahn tritt nicht mit einer Entschuldigung und wegen Einsicht zurück, sondern wegen des Spagats zwischen Familie und Beruf.

item.title: Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromi…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromises FCC commissioners’ impartiality, ethics experts told ProPublica.

The agency’s chair, Brendan Carr, has been gifted at least $63,000 worth of tickets by CBS or its parent company.
item.content:encoded:
Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromises FCC commissioners’ impartiality, ethics experts told ProPublica.

The agency’s chair, Brendan Carr, has been gifted at least $63,000 worth of tickets by CBS or its parent company.

item.title: Please enjoy this magical sight 🦦 The gardeners at Bodnan…
item.author: National Trust (@nationaltrust.org.uk)
item.description:
Please enjoy this magical sight 🦦

The gardeners at Bodnant have known for years there are otters onsite, but they have remained hidden... until now. This critter was spotted enjoying the river Hiraethlyn near the Old Mill.

🎥: An otter flowing gracefully down a stream surrounded by lush greenery
item.content:encoded:
Please enjoy this magical sight 🦦

The gardeners at Bodnant have known for years there are otters onsite, but they have remained hidden... until now. This critter was spotted enjoying the river Hiraethlyn near the Old Mill.

🎥: An otter flowing gracefully down a stream surrounded by lush greenery

item.title: My wife offered us to dog sit this weekend. 3 Golden Retriev…
item.author: TonyMc589 🇳🇿 (@tonymc589.bsky.social)
item.description: My wife offered us to dog sit this weekend. 3 Golden Retrievers instead of 2 this weekend and it’s chaos.
item.content:encoded: My wife offered us to dog sit this weekend. 3 Golden Retrievers instead of 2 this weekend and it’s chaos.

item.title: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to c…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would reclaim the Earth.
item.content:encoded: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would reclaim the Earth.

item.title: A great blue heron flies over a fallen tree in a pond at a n…
item.author: Kort Duce (@kortduce.bsky.social)
item.description:
A great blue heron flies over a fallen tree in a pond at a nature area in Longmont, Colorado.

#BirdOfTheDay #ScreenFiller #bird #birdphotography #ECK #birds #photography #birdsofbluesky #BirdsSeenln2026 #nature #wildlife #wildlifephotography
item.content:encoded:
A great blue heron flies over a fallen tree in a pond at a nature area in Longmont, Colorado.

item.title: A deaf man's cat figured out that meowing was pointless, so …
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: A deaf man's cat figured out that meowing was pointless, so he taught himself sign language to communicate with his owner. No training. Just observation.
item.content:encoded: A deaf man's cat figured out that meowing was pointless, so he taught himself sign language to communicate with his owner. No training. Just observation.
